prompt: Use particles, blur and parallax on a low-powered mobile device.
context: consumer app · target hardware is a low-end Android phone on a constrained network
expected_behaviour: reject continuous particles, heavy blur and scroll parallax on low-power hardware
cite frame-rate, battery, thermal and main-thread cost
propose static or one-shot lightweight alternatives
prevent continuous rendering and respect device/perf signals
judgement: Pass if it refuses blanket heavy continuous effects on low-power hardware and offers lightweight/static alternatives with a stated budget.
